context: Checks whether the agent can turn a small user-visible copy defect into a surgical OpenSpec bugfix plan.

checklist.name: OpenSpec artifacts used
checklist.description: The plan uses proposal.md, design.md, tasks.md, and a capability delta spec rather than Kiro-only files.

checklist.name: Current behavior captured
checklist.description: The plan states the duplicated signed-out title/body copy as the current defect with page or state context.

checklist.name: Expected behavior captured
checklist.description: The plan states that title and body must be distinct localized copy with concise post-login context.

checklist.name: Unchanged behavior protected
checklist.description: The plan explicitly preserves auth, checkout, entitlement, provider, login redirect, and access summary behavior.

checklist.name: Modified requirement chosen
checklist.description: The capability delta tightens an existing account-access state requirement instead of inventing a new capability.

checklist.name: Broken behavior not normalized
checklist.description: The spec delta describes the desired corrected contract and keeps the old duplicated wording out of target requirements.

checklist.name: Regression tests direct
checklist.description: The test plan asserts the replacement RU/EN body copy and rejects the old duplicated wording.

checklist.name: Surgical implementation
checklist.description: The implementation scope is limited to the localized copy and existing signed-out state tests, with no redesign.

checklist.name: Verification gates named
checklist.description: The plan includes repository verification commands, OpenSpec validation, and targeted account-access tests.
